message:
Remove dead depth variable, stream_get_buffer_cap export, and add missing tape exports to build.zig

- Remove unused `depth` variable in preprocess_json5_alloc (stack_depth handles all logic)
- Remove dead stream_get_buffer_cap export fn (not in EngineExports, never called from JS)
- Add doc_export_tape_size/doc_export_tape/doc_import_tape to build.zig export list
  (already exported via rdynamic=true, but list serves as documentation)

files.patch:
@@ -69,6 +69,10 @@ pub fn build(b: *std.Build) void {
         "stream_get_remaining_len",
         "stream_get_buffer_len",
         "stream_reset_for_next",
+        // Tape export/import
+        "doc_export_tape_size",
+        "doc_export_tape",
+        "doc_import_tape",
         // Deep comparison
         "doc_deep_equal",
         // Input classification & autocomplete
